name: Crispy Rice and Marshmallow Treats
recipeInstructions:
Place marshmallows in a large saucepan, sprayed with non-stick cooking spray. Warm the marshmallows over low heat to melt. Remove the pan from the heat occasionally to prevent scorching.
Stir constantly until the marshmallows are melted. Add vanilla extract and Molly McButter, and mix well.
In a large bowl, combine crispy rice cereal and graham crackers. Pour this mixture into the melted marshmallow and stir until all cereal is coated. Transfer the mixture to a large baking dish sprayed with non-stick cooking spray.
Using a non-stick-coated spoon, gently press the mixture into the baking dish. Allow to cool for 20-30 minutes before slicing into servings.
